name: Kendall Recreation Area ramp (Cumberland tailwater)
notes: USACE ramp off US 127 just below Wolf Creek Dam; closed some winters for dam ops.

name: Hatchery Creek lot (Wolf Creek NFH visitor center)
notes: Park at the hatchery visitor center; lower gravel lot off Annex Rd; trails flank the creek.

name: Helm's Landing boat ramp (Cumberland tailwater)
notes: About 4.5 miles below Wolf Creek Dam off KY 379; popular rainbow water.

name: Winfrey's Ferry ramp (Cumberland tailwater)
notes: Takeout for the first 16 miles of tailwater floats from the dam.

name: East Fork Indian Creek access (Daniel Boone NF)
notes: KDFWR-listed access on the seasonal catch & release brown trout stream.

name: Rock Creek at Bell Farm bridge
notes: Seasonal C&R water runs from Bell Farm bridge upstream to the TN line; Daniel Boone NF.

name: Swift Camp Creek / Rock Bridge trailhead (Clifty Wilderness)
notes: Hike-in access off KY 715 to the Red River Gorge area trout stream.
